summary: A high-energy R&B track that channels late-90s futuristic vibes and Sega Genesis inspiration to tell a story of romantic urgency and playful competition.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A neon-lit cityscape with a couple racing hand-in-hand through the streets
A video game character speeding up to break the speed limit on a digital racetrack
A futuristic mission control room with glowing screens and countdown timers
Two silhouettes running side-by-side in silhouette against a sunrise horizon
An upward spiral of interconnected rings, each representing a new level or achievement
A couple collecting golden power-ups on a moonlit beach under a radiant full moon
Two figures leaping high into an endless starry night, reaching out to touch the stars
